parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, system: 'You are a business analyst for ProFit Swimming Academy (Dubai AED + Baku AZN). Analyze booking data: peak hours, busiest days, coach utilization rates, popular pools, cancellation patterns. Give actionable recommendations.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Analyze the following booking and operational data:

' + JSON.stringify($input.first().json, null, 2) + '

Provide a comprehensive booking analytics report including:
1. Peak Hours — when are most lessons booked
2. Busiest Days — day-of-week trends
3. Coach Utilization — which coaches are overbooked or underbooked
4. Popular Pools/Locations — top locations by booking volume
5. Cancellation Patterns — rate, common reasons, time-of-cancellation trends
6. Revenue per Booking — average lesson fee and transport fee
7. City Comparison — Dubai vs Baku performance
8. Actionable Recommendations — top 5 things to improve

Return valid JSON only — no markdown, no backticks.' }] }) }}
